Related Entities

  • hospital PIEDMONT COLUMBUS REGIONAL MIDTOWN 1-star overall rating
  • hospital ST FRANCIS HOSPITAL- EMORY HEALTHCARE 3-star overall rating
  • hospital PIEDMONT COLUMBUS REGIONAL NORTHSIDE 5-star overall rating
  • hospital WEST CENTRAL GEORGIA REGIONAL HOSPITAL
  • snf MAGNOLIA MANOR OF COLUMBUS NURSING CENTER - WEST 2-star, 166 beds
  • snf MAGNOLIA MANOR OF COLUMBUS NURSING CENTER - EAST 2-star, 210 beds
  • snf ORCHARD VIEW REHABILITATION & SKILLED NURSING CTR 4-star, 200 beds
  • snf MUSCOGEE MANOR & REHABILITATION CTR 3-star, 196 beds
  • snf RIDGECREST REHAB & SKILLED NURSING CENTER 5-star, 84 beds
  • snf RIVER TOWNE CENTER 1-star, 210 beds
  • snf SPRING HARBOR AT GREEN ISLAND 4-star, 40 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
